senses.definition: pieces of clothing worn by actors or performers for a role, or worn by someone to look like another person or thing

examples.x: The theater production featured stunning period costumes that transported the audience back in time to the Victorian era.
Ballet dancers rehearsed tirelessly, perfecting their movements while adorned in elegant costumes that enhanced the beauty of their performances.
The film's success was partly attributed to its stunning visual effects and detailed period costumes that transported viewers to another era.
Halloween is the perfect opportunity to get creative and put together a unique costume that reflects your personality or favorite character.
The costume party was a hit, with guests arriving dressed as everything from superheroes to classic movie monsters.

senses.definition: an item of clothing that is worn to cover the upper part of the body

examples.x: She paired her new jeans with a casual top for a comfortable yet stylish outfit.
The store has a wide selection of summer tops, from tank tops to blouses.
He wore a fitted top that highlighted his athletic build during the workout.
The floral print top is perfect for a day out in the sun.
She decided to wear a long-sleeve top for the evening since it was getting cooler outside.

senses.definition: a clothing item worn beneath outer clothing by men and women that covers the lower part of their bodies

examples.x: He bought a new pack of underpants for his upcoming trip.
The laundry basket was filled with socks and underpants.
She prefers cotton underpants for everyday wear.
The child proudly showed off his superhero-themed underpants.
Underpants are an essential part of any wardrobe.

senses.definition: a short piece of clothing that women wear under the pants, skirts, etc.
an item of clothing that is worn for swimming, particularly the type that women and girls wear

examples.x: She packed her favorite bathing suit for the beach vacation.
His bathing suit was hanging on the line to dry.
She wore a one-piece bathing suit to the pool.
She purchased a new bathing suit before the summer season began.
They sell bathing suits designed for competitive swimming.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing such as a sweatshirt or jacket that has a cover for the head

examples.x: He wore a hoodie to stay warm on the chilly morning walk.
Her favorite hoodie has a soft fleece lining inside.
She bought a hoodie with her favorite sports team’s logo on it.
He grabbed his hoodie off the chair before heading out in the rain.
She prefers wearing a hoodie to the gym because it’s comfortable.

senses.definition: a loose long-sleeved warm item of clothing worn casually or for exercising on the top part of our body, usually made of cotton

examples.x: She wore a sweatshirt to stay warm on the chilly evening.
He bought a new sweatshirt with a logo of his favorite team.
Sweatshirts are perfect for layering during colder months.
The cozy sweatshirt was made of fleece material.
He paired his sweatshirt with jeans for a casual look.

senses.definition: a long coat worn in cold weather to keep the body warm
(of clothes) loose and not fitting the body tightly

examples.x: She preferred wearing baggy jeans for comfort during long flights.
His baggy sweater kept him warm during the chilly evening.
The teenager's baggy shirt gave off a casual, laid-back vibe.

senses.definition: the part around the neck of a piece of clothing that usually turns over

examples.x: She adjusted the collar of her blouse to make sure it lay flat against her shoulders.
The dog wore a bright red collar with a shiny tag that displayed his name and owner’s contact information.
He rolled up the collar of his jacket to protect himself from the chilly wind.
The tailor suggested adding a contrasting color to the collar to give the shirt a more stylish look.
As she buttoned her coat, she noticed that the collar was frayed and in need of repair.

senses.definition: the part of an item of clothing that completely or partly covers one's arm

examples.x: She rolled up her sleeve to reveal the tattoo.
She wore a blouse with puffed sleeves.
The dress has no sleeves, making it perfect for summer.
The coat had fur-lined sleeves to keep warm.
The sleeve of his sweater was too tight.

senses.definition: to put clothes on oneself

examples.x: He dressed quickly in a suit and tie for the formal event.
Before heading out, they took the time to dress in layers for the changing weather.
Before leaving the house, he dressed in a business suit for the important meeting.
The child learned to dress independently, choosing their own clothes each morning.
After the workout, they showered and dressed in fresh clothes.

senses.definition: to bring two parts of something together

examples.x: He couldn't figure out how to fasten the buttons on his shirt with his cold fingers.
Please make sure to fasten your seatbelt before the flight takes off.
The carpenter worked diligently to fasten the loose planks of the wooden fence.
The necklace has a delicate clasp that can be used to fasten it securely around your neck.

senses.definition: to close and secure clothing by attaching the parts that hold it together

examples.x: She will button her coat before heading out into the cold weather to stay warm.
Before the meeting, he will button his suit jacket for a polished appearance.
The parent helps the preschooler practice buttoning their jacket as a valuable skill.
He buttoned his pants after tucking in his shirt, completing his professional attire.
She buttoned her cardigan halfway, leaving the bottom buttons undone for a casual look.

senses.definition: thick thread made from the fibers of sheep or other animals, commonly used for knitting

examples.x: She bought several skeins of wool to knit a warm sweater for the winter.
The shop offered a variety of colors and textures of wool for all kinds of knitting projects.
After learning how to knit, he quickly became fascinated with different types of wool.
The blanket was made from soft wool, providing warmth on chilly nights.
She enjoyed experimenting with patterns using different shades of wool to create unique designs.

senses.definition: currently popular, trendy, or in style
following the latest or the most popular styles and trends in a specific period

examples.x: She always stays fashionable by keeping up with the latest trends and incorporating them into her wardrobe.
The fashionable celebrity is often seen wearing the newest designer clothing and accessories.
Despite her busy schedule, she manages to remain fashionable and well-dressed for every occasion.
The fashionable boutique attracts customers with its curated selection of trendy clothing and accessories.
He prides himself on being fashionable and is always ahead of the curve when it comes to style.
The fashionable neighborhood is known for its trendy cafes, boutiques, and vibrant street fashion.

senses.definition: influenced by the latest or popular styles

examples.x: The trendy hairstyle she sported quickly became popular among her friends.
He likes to shop at trendy boutiques to keep his wardrobe fresh.
This season's trendy colors seem to be pastel shades and earthy tones.
Fashion magazines are full of articles about the latest trendy looks.
Trendy restaurants often feature innovative fusion cuisine.

senses.definition: a typically repeating arrangement of shapes, colors, etc., regularly done as a design on a surface

examples.x: The wallpaper had a beautiful floral pattern that added elegance to the room.
The intricate pattern on the rug depicted scenes from ancient mythology.
His shirt had a bold stripe pattern that made it stand out in the crowd.
The artist created a mesmerizing mosaic pattern on the courtyard floor using colorful tiles.

senses.definition: material used for making clothes, which is made by knitting or weaving silk, cotton, etc.

examples.x: The tailor measured the cloth before cutting it for the suit.
He preferred clothes made from natural cloth like cotton and linen.
The market stall was filled with colorful cloth of various patterns and textures.
They used fine silk cloth to create elegant evening gowns.

senses.definition: a design consisting of lines or bands with a different color from the background, often used on clothing, textiles, or other surfaces

examples.x: The cat has a stripe on its tail.
The raccoon has a black stripe across its eyes.

senses.definition: strong cotton cloth that is usually blue in color, particularly used in making jeans

examples.x: The jacket was made of durable denim, making it ideal for casual outings and outdoor activities.
After a few washes, the denim started to fade, giving it a stylish, vintage look.
Many fashion designers are now experimenting with sustainable denim, focusing on eco-friendly production methods.

senses.definition: cloth made from the fibers of the cotton plant, naturally soft and comfortable against the skin

examples.x: Cotton fabric is a staple in my wardrobe because of its breathability and comfort, especially during hot summer days.
I prefer cotton towels because of their absorbency and softness, making them perfect for drying off after a refreshing shower.
The durability of cotton bed sheets ensures they withstand frequent washing and maintain their quality over time.
The natural feel of cotton against my skin makes it my top choice for bedding, ensuring a cozy and comfortable night's sleep.
I love the versatility of cotton clothing, from casual T-shirts for lounging at home to elegant cotton dresses for special occasions.

senses.definition: strong material made from animal skin and used for making clothes, bags, shoes, etc.

examples.x: The artisan crafted a beautiful leather wallet, carefully stitching each seam by hand.
The furniture store showcased a range of leather sofas, each offering a luxurious and sophisticated look.
After years of use, the leather shoes had developed a rich patina that added character and charm.

senses.definition: the skin of an animal that has died with its thick and soft hair still on it

examples.x: In the dim light of the antique shop, a coat made from the fur of a fox caught my eye.
As winter approached, villagers sought out the warm comfort of blankets crafted from the fur of rabbits and foxes, a tradition passed down through generations.
The museum's exhibit showcased the intricate process of preserving fur, displaying lifelike animals with their fur still intact, frozen in time.
Environmental activists protest against the use of fur in clothing, advocating for cruelty-free alternatives to protect animal rights and preserve ecosystems.
The trapper carefully prepared the fur, ensuring that each piece of hide retained its natural beauty and integrity even after the animal's passing.

senses.definition: a bag designed for carrying on the back, usually used by those who go hiking or climbing

examples.x: She packed her backpack with all the essentials for the hiking trip.
The climber's sturdy backpack was filled with ropes and climbing gear.
He adjusted the straps of his backpack for a more comfortable fit.
The durable backpack had compartments for water bottles and snacks.
They carried lightweight backpacks to navigate the steep mountain trails more easily.

senses.definition: (of clothes, a color, hairstyle, etc.) to look good on someone

examples.x: The bold red dress really suits her and complements her skin tone.
Neutral tones tend to suit him well, enhancing his classic and sophisticated style.
Bright colors may not suit everyone, but they bring out her vibrant personality.
Certain hairstyles can really suit a person's face shape and features.

senses.definition: a piece of underwear worn by women to cover and support their breasts

examples.x: She bought a new bra that offered better support and comfort.
The store offers a wide range of bra sizes to fit different body types.
She wore a strapless bra under her evening gown.
She carefully chose a bra that matched her outfit for the special occasion.

senses.definition: cloth that is made from the fibers of a plant called flax, used to make fine clothes, etc.

examples.x: She dressed in a simple linen dress, enjoying the breathability and comfort of the fabric on the hot summer day.
The artisan crafted intricate embroidery on the linen napkins, adding a personalized touch to the dining experience.
As a sustainable choice, many environmentally-conscious consumers opt for linen towels and linens, appreciating the eco-friendly qualities of the natural fiber.
The table was elegantly set with a linen tablecloth, adding a touch of sophistication to the dinner party.

senses.definition: a pattern of shapes and lines as a decoration

examples.x: The jewelry box is engraved with a delicate heart design.
The rug displays a colorful design with circles and squares.
The ceiling has a unique design with stars and moons.
The tiles in the kitchen form a geometric design with triangles and squares.
